pages.raw_text:
Prominent Scandinavian speak
ers will address a local option meet
ing next Sunday at 3 p. m. In the
Swedish tabernacle, Second and d.
vision. The purpose of the meet
ing is to arouse the interest OF the
public in local option and nominal
ing at the primaries candidates
who have pledged their support to
an effective local option law. The
program includes prayer by Rev.
A.. r. Anderson and welcome ad.
dress by Oscar Johnson. "The Ad-
vantages Of Local Option" by the
secretary of the International Re-
form bureau, Rev. F. A. Scarve;
song by Mrs. H. Stanton; "The AID.
vance of the Temperance Move
ment," by Rev. John M Oslund;
"Our Duties as Citizens" by Rev.
X. A. Lundin; "The New Primary
Election Laws by the grand cleo
toral superintendent of the Interna-
tional Order of Good Templars, Au-
gust Cedercrans; ''The Advantages
of Temperance Community" by
Rev. A. r. Anderson.
